# HPD.ML.Regression

Generated from published HPD ML `0.5.0` packages.

## HPD-ML-Regression

- [`OlsOptions`](../types/hpd-ml-regression-olsoptions.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`OnlineGradientDescentLearner`](../types/hpd-ml-regression-onlinegradientdescentlearner.md) - Online gradient descent for regression with squared loss. Processes one sample at a time, supports weight averaging and warm-start.
- [`OnlineGradientDescentOptions`](../types/hpd-ml-regression-onlinegradientdescentoptions.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`OrdinaryLeastSquaresLearner`](../types/hpd-ml-regression-ordinaryleastsquareslearner.md) - Ordinary Least Squares regression via L-BFGS with analytic gradients. Minimizes (1/2n) Σ (w·x + b - y)² + regularization.
- [`PoissonRegressionLearner`](../types/hpd-ml-regression-poissonregressionlearner.md) - Poisson regression via L-BFGS with analytic gradients. Model: E[y] = exp(w·x + b), trained by minimizing Poisson negative log-likelihood. Useful for count data (insurance claims, event rates, healthcare).
- [`PoissonRegressionOptions`](../types/hpd-ml-regression-poissonregressionoptions.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`RegressionExtensions`](../types/hpd-ml-regression-regressionextensions.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`RegressionScoringTransform`](../types/hpd-ml-regression-regressionscoringtransform.md) - Applies a linear model to produce regression predictions. Output column: "Score" (float). For Poisson: applies exp() to the linear score.
- [`SdcaRegressionLearner`](../types/hpd-ml-regression-sdcaregressionlearner.md) - Stochastic Dual Coordinate Ascent for regression with squared loss. Dual update: Δαᵢ = (yᵢ - wᵀxᵢ - αᵢ) / (‖xᵢ‖²/(λn) + 1)
- [`SdcaRegressionOptions`](../types/hpd-ml-regression-sdcaregressionoptions.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
